goal: Set up CI workflow to run pnpm pipelines, upload artifacts, and enforce as merge gate.
constraints: Workflow must upload episodes and reports artifacts

acceptance.then: Steps pnpm setup/typecheck/lint/test/build/smoke succeed and artifacts uploaded

input.command: Create or update .github/workflows/ci.yml with required configuration
Ensure branch protection documentation updated if necessary

risks: Missing pnpm cache or install step causing workflow failure
Artifacts directories absent leading to upload errors
rollback: Revert workflow file if pipeline misconfigured
